title: castilleja mollis
intro: Castilleja mollis, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Castilleja mollis include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be studied further.
